---
title: "02. Selecting Preparing and Canning Fruit and Fruit Products"
author: "Chris Kornaros"
date: 2026-03-06
categories: ["Cooking & Kitchen Tips"]
---

```{=html}
<iframe src="02. Selecting Preparing and Canning Fruit and Fruit Products.pdf" width="100%" height="900px" style="border: none;"></iframe>
```
